seo_home_description: Premium trading platform, signals, academy and market analysis.
dashboard_seo_desc: Premium trading dashboard with signals, performance, briefing, replay and academy.
footer_desc: Premium trading signals, results and academy platform.
upgrade_text: Unlock the full Academy, premium videos and certification.
hero_desc: VelWolef turns market noise into clear execution. Signals, results, dashboard and Trading Lab combined in one platform built for serious traders.
market_unavailable: Market news is not available at the moment.
platform_title: An environment built to filter noise and accelerate execution
platform_desc: VelWolef brings together signals, results, Trading Lab and member space in an experience designed like a real premium product.
signal_engine_title: Actionable signals in seconds, without ambiguity
signal_engine_desc: Each setup highlights key levels, market context, signal status and an immediate visual read.
results_desc: Win rate, visible history and structured progress in a credible interface.
lab_desc: Structure, risk management, psychology and execution logic.
dashboard_desc: The member area extends the experience with faster navigation, useful views and a more premium perception.
why_desc: VelWolef structures market information to turn complexity into clear, actionable reading.
clarity_desc: Each signal is readable in seconds.
logic_desc: Entry, risk and target clearly defined.
proof_title: Readable, verifiable and directly actionable results
proof_desc: VelWolef focuses on performance transparency. Each signal fits into a clear history, with consistent execution logic and immediate result readability.
decision_structure_desc: Information is organized to enable fast decision-making without visual overload or ambiguity.
data_priority_desc: Key elements are highlighted to instantly understand context and conviction level.
pro_environment_desc: An interface designed for real use, combining readability, discipline and day-to-day operational efficiency.
final_cta_title: Join a platform built to read markets with more precision and confidence
final_cta_desc: Access signals, results, Trading Lab and a member area that truly feels premium.
pricing_title: Choose the plan that matches your ambition
pricing_desc: Three plans designed to help you discover signals, improve with more analysis, then access a more complete and responsive trading experience.
basic_desc: The essentials to discover the service, follow key opportunities and start building market rhythm.
premium_desc: A plan built for more serious traders who want more context, more explanations and more filtered opportunities.
vip_desc: The most complete experience for members who want responsiveness, more depth and true multi-market insight.
pricing_note_desc: Basic to get started, Premium to improve with more analysis, VIP for a more complete, faster and more strategic experience.
feature_priority_alerts: Priority on new features and alerts
dashboard_sidebar_vip: VIP access active • full signals, enriched briefing and private universe.
dashboard_sidebar_premium: Premium access active • performance, daily briefing and full analysis.
dashboard_sidebar_basic: Basic access active • intermediate environment with unlocked signals.
dashboard_sidebar_free: Discovery mode • limited preview to showcase system quality.
unlock_academy_terminal: Unlock Pro Academy and the advanced terminal
upgrade_premium_briefing: Go Premium to unlock stats, replay and briefing
unlock_academy_terminal_desc: Activate Pro to access full courses, progression, quizzes, certification and better use of signals.
upgrade_premium_briefing_desc: Your Basic plan opens the door. The next level unlocks sensitive metrics, replay and deeper market reading.
dashboard_terminal_desc: A cockpit inspired by hedge fund interfaces to manage signals, performance, execution, learning and member progression.
basic_shows_potential: Your Basic plan shows the potential
unlock_training_progression: Unlock the full training, premium videos and real progression.
unlock_stats_briefing_replay: Move to the next level to access advanced stats, briefing and replay.
free_plan_environment: The free plan shows the environment. Pro unlocks the full Academy, quizzes, certification, replay and the premium logic behind the signals.
basic_good_entry: Basic is a good entry point. Premium and VIP turn the experience into a real progression terminal with more depth, analysis and retention.
basic_quota_desc: You receive up to 5 signals per day with a simpler briefing.
premium_quota_desc: You receive up to 10 signals per day with more context and a second brief.
vip_quota_desc: You receive all signals, detailed briefs and priority updates without limit.
free_quota_desc: Upgrade to Basic, Premium or VIP to unlock Telegram signals.
sent_today_desc: Number of signals already distributed today for your subscription level.
vip_unlimited_flow: VIP members receive an unlimited flow.
quota_restriction_desc: Once this quota is reached, new signals remain reserved for the higher tier.
briefing_vip_desc: Detailed version with priority focus and desk reading.
briefing_paid_only: Unlock a paid plan to activate briefings.
vip_daily_limit: VIP: unlimited flow + detailed briefing + desk priority.
total_trades_desc: Total volume of signals recorded across the displayed history.
cumulative_pnl_desc: Cumulative result of all closed trades.
stats_hidden_desc: Detailed performance is hidden in discovery and Basic mode.
winrate_desc: Success rate calculated on closed trades.
winrate_hidden_desc: Detailed win rate is hidden in discovery and Basic mode.
latest_signal_empty_desc: The dashboard will show the latest executed setup here as soon as a new signal is recorded.
structured_signal_desc: Signal published with structured technical logic, awaiting full market validation.
unlock_full_history_desc: Unlock full history, premium statistics, daily briefs and the advanced member experience.
winning_trade_empty_desc: Winning trades will appear here automatically as soon as a TP is validated.
briefing_locked_desc: The daily briefing gives a market angle, macro context and the reading of assets to watch.
badge_desc: Badge shown at the top of the desk to track consistency, execution quality and profile progression.
vip_desk_open: Your VIP Telegram desk is open
telegram_vip_locked: The real Telegram flow remains VIP-only
vip_telegram_desc: Access your private channel to receive signals, rapid updates and strategic announcements.
premium_telegram_desc: Premium unlocks the advanced platform. The private Telegram channel remains the exclusive VIP layer.
basic_telegram_desc: You have access to the dashboard and signals, but the priority Telegram flow remains closed until VIP.
free_telegram_desc: Start with the public channel, then unlock Premium and VIP for full distribution access.
replay_desc: Work on decision-making, management and execution with a structured trade replay.
replay_locked_desc_2: Access trade reviews to understand entry, management and exit.
add_replay_desc: Add a replay to a trade to enrich the learning zone.
vip_desk_full: Your VIP desk is running at full speed.
premium_desk_full: Your premium desk is running at full speed.
upgrade_for_stats_briefing_replay: Move up to unlock stats, briefing and replay.
unlock_full_terminal: Unlock the full terminal, daily briefing and the Premium business layer.
membership_desc: Discovery mode remains a conversion showcase. Premium unlocks sensitive metrics, briefing and analysis. VIP adds private Telegram, alert priority and a closed-club effect to boost perceived value.
